meta.title: The Assay of Influenza Antineuraminidase Activity by an Elution Inhibition Technique

abstractHtml: The antineuraminidase activities of rabbit and human antisera were titrated by their ability to inhibit the elution of influenza virus from fowl red cells. The method was specific, sensitive and simple, and the results correlated well with those of conventional neuraminidase inhibition tests.
